action.reasoning: Observation: The current implementation of Synaptic Intelligence (SI) is failing due to a device mismatch error. The error occurs at line 118 in model.py where the params_old tensors (stored on CPU) are being operated with the current parameters (on CUDA). Analysis: When initializing the SI model, the params_old tensors are created as clones of the original parameters but they remain on the CPU even when the model is moved to CUDA. Decision: I need to fix the SIModel initialization to ensure that all internal tensors (params_old, running_sum, w) are moved to the same device as the model parameters.
